executionArgs.additionalInstruction: This is a multi-tenant dealership management app (AutoFlow). Auth is handled by Clerk — sign in at /sign-in using {{LOGIN_USER}} and {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}. After login, the user may see an onboarding wizard if no org is configured yet. The sidebar shows navigation links. Use id selectors where available (e.g. #btn-new-cash-sale). Language toggle is in the sidebar. The app supports English and Arabic RTL.
